title: Level 630/offset
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 630: "Natural Serenity"}} {{Custom Theme|color=110|bg=[[File:Recovered Photo.png]]}} {{Class Habitable}} ==Description== {{Blurimage|file=Recovered Photo.png|hovertext=Stunning Paradise|caption=An image of '''Level 630''' before its pollution.}} Level 630, nicknamed as "Nature Serenity" is a vast, ethereal forest; extending approximately 60 million mi². The level includes trees similar to those found in [[The Frontrooms]], being extremely smooth and spanning from 10 to 50 feet high. Types of trees that are present here include oak, birch and several undiscovered types of trees. Other plant life is also present on Level 630, including grass, vibrant flowers, and shimmering plants which are found within the level. Aside from plants, other natural objects are also present, including rocks, rivers, fallen trees and lakes. Unique lakes, rivers and ponds are found throughout the level, containing pure [[Object 1|Almond Water]]. The water is safe to consume and releases a calming aroma, relaxing wanderers. Man-made structures are also present in this level, which includes cabins, watchtowers, tunnels, piles of logs and bases; which contains several objects such as tools, almond water, food and other items, all of which are in perfect quality. As one wanders far enough in Level 630, one may find a clear ocean made of [[Object 1|Almond Water]]. It is recommended for one to go to the ocean as it provides a near-endless supply of [[Object 1|Almond Water]]. The ocean also includes an exit to Level 87 that can be found when one travels far enough. Level 630 has a positive mental effect on wanderers who stay in this level for over a day, causing them to feel relaxed, satisfied, and friendly. In addition, if one takes a picture of this level, it will appear extremely beautiful to the viewer, regardless of their taste. === Temperature and Climate === Level 630’s temperature is similar to that of the Frontrooms; as the temperature at daytime ranges from 20°C to 30°C, and at nighttime the temperature ranges from 15°C to 20°C. The day and night cycle of the level takes approximately 24 hours to complete, leading to 12 hours of sunlight and 12 hours of darkness. The weather of this level is mostly clear, however the level includes other weather events, such as rain and fog— which are safe for the wanderer. == Entities == '''Level 630''' is entirely devoid of entities; however, several reports have concluded that duck-like entities have been spotted within the western parts of the level, but this cannot be confirmed yet due to lack of evidence. == Colonies and Outposts == === The Tree Residents === * Population of 43 members; * Creates treehouses for wanderers to live in; * Friendly; * Willing to trade and accept new members. === Outpost 630 === * Population of 29 members; * Lives near the ocean; * Friendly; * Willing to trade. == Entrances and Exits == === Entrances === * One may also enter from [[Level 995]], by having 100 to 149 karma. === Exits === * Travelling far enough in the oceans will take one to [[Level 87]]; * Finding an abandoned 7-11 and entering it will lead one to [[Level 711]]. {{Collapse|initial=> Open Author & Licensing Information|final=< Close Author & Licensing Information|body=Author and 1st rewriter: [[User:Homie Robot|Homie Robot]]. 2nd rewrite by: [[User:Qoenfjs|Qoenfjs]]. {{User:Qoenfjs/credits}}}}
